paper_focus.title: Co-precipitation mechanism of Cu-rich phase and κ-carbide precipitates in Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C-3Cu austenitic low-density steel
paper_focus.research_objective: To clarify the co-precipitation mechanism of Cu-rich phase and κ-carbide precipitates in Fe-28Mn-10Al-1C-3Cu austenitic low-density steel.
main_process_variables: austenite matrix lattice parameter (critical value ~0.3670 nm)
expected_information_axis: elemental partitioning (EDS mapping of Fe, Mn, Al, Cu)
